title: Fringe Academy How To Market Your Event
description: Join Caz Slota from Spark Arts AM&PM and Tom Hooker from Lost Hippo to chat about how to best market your event for Brighton Fringe 2026. Caz Slota founded Spark AM&PM in 2018, providing marketing consultancy services for arts companies across the UK – from hyper-local community projects to major organisations with an international audience. Caz began her career in arts marketing and management at The King’s Head Theatre in London before moving on to Norwich Playhouse, spending the next 10 years promoting performances of every possible size and shape, and running the venue as part of the senior management team. Caz mentors early-career arts marketers through the AMA mentoring scheme. Please copy and paste this link into your browser to join the event: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/7800653204?omn=85920504769
